parameters.query:
=SELECT COALESCE(s.human_takeover, false) AS human_takeover,
       s.takeover_at,
       s.id AS session_db_id
FROM (SELECT '{{ $('Normalize entrada').first().json.session_id }}'::text AS sid) x
LEFT JOIN public.chat_sessions s ON s.session_id = x.sid

=UPDATE public.chat_sessions
SET human_takeover = false, takeover_at = NULL, updated_at = now()
WHERE session_id = '{{ $('Gate humano 60s').first().json.session_id }}'

=INSERT INTO public.chat_clients (clinic_id, name, phone)
VALUES (
  NULLIF('{{ $json.clinic_id }}', '')::uuid,
  NULLIF('{{ String($json.contact_name || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
  '{{ String($json.contact_phone || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (phone) DO UPDATE SET
  name = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.name, ''), chat_clients.name),
  clinic_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.clinic_id, chat_clients.clinic_id)
RETURNING id;

=INSERT INTO public.chat_sessions (session_id, client_id, human_takeover)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Anexar client_id').first().json.session_id }}',
  '{{ $('Anexar client_id').first().json.client_id }}'::uuid,
  false
)
ON CONFLICT (session_id) DO UPDATE SET
  client_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.client_id, chat_sessions.client_id),
  updated_at = now()
RETURNING id;

=SELECT string_agg(
  '[' || role || '] ' || left(content, 500),
  E'\n' ORDER BY created_at ASC
) AS conversation_history
FROM (
  SELECT role, content, created_at
  FROM public.chat_messages
  WHERE session_id = '{{ $('Anexar client_id').first().json.session_id }}'
  ORDER BY created_at DESC
  LIMIT 20
) sub

=INSERT INTO public.chat_messages (session_id, client_id, role, content, message_type)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Preparar input IA').first().json.session_id }}',
  '{{ $('Preparar input IA').first().json.client_id }}'::uuid,
  'user',
  left('{{ String($('Preparar input IA').first().json.current_message || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', 8000),
  '{{ $('Preparar input IA').first().json.message_type }}'
);

=UPDATE public.chat_sessions
SET human_takeover = true, takeover_at = now(), updated_at = now()
WHERE session_id = '{{ $('Parse QUEBRA e humano').first().json.session_id }}'

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ number: $env.CLINIC_OWNER_WHATSAPP, text: '🚨 Takeover: ' + $('Parse QUEBRA e humano').first().json.contact_phone + ' — ' + $('Parse QUEBRA e humano').first().json.texto_primeiro }) }}

=INSERT INTO public.chat_messages (session_id, client_id, role, content, message_type)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Parse QUEBRA e humano').first().json.session_id }}',
  '{{ $('Parse QUEBRA e humano').first().json.client_id }}'::uuid,
  'assistant',

);

parameters.content:
## Agente clínica (prompt v2)

1. SQL: `n8n_agent_chat_schema.sql`
2. Postgres + envs: `CLINIC_*`, `OPENAI_*`, `OPENAI_VISION_MODEL` (opcional), `EVOLUTION_*`
3. `[QUEBRA]` → nó **Enviar partes WhatsApp** (delay 1,5–2,5 s entre blocos)
4. Áudio: download Evolution + **Whisper**; imagem: download + **Vision** (gpt-4o-mini) no Code
5. Mensagem **user** gravada **após** multimodal (`current_message` com transcrição/descrição)
6. `ON CONFLICT (phone)` em `chat_clients` — telefone único
